bigCard.title: Our Approach
bigCard.description:
GS Capital supports impact organizations in structuring, strengthening, and executing their financial strategy by integrating specialized consulting, sustainability model design, investment project structuring, and fundraising strategies.

The goal is to align their social mission with a real capacity for operation, growth, and scalability over time.

about.title: About Us
about.description: GS Capital supports impact organizations in structuring, strengthening, and executing their financial strategy by integrating specialized consulting, sustainability model design, investment project structuring, and fundraising strategies, with the goal of aligning their social mission with a real capacity for operation, growth, and scalability over time.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To support organizations, companies, and actors within the development ecosystem in structuring, strengthening, and executing their financial strategy by integrating consulting, fundraising, and investment plan structuring, with the aim of building sustainable models that enable growth, scalability, and real long-term impact.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be a leading firm in Latin America in structuring financial solutions for organizations and companies operating in development contexts, recognized for its ability to connect strategy, investments, capital, and impact, and for transforming the way purpose-driven initiatives are designed, financed, and scaled.

financialRigor.title: Financial rigor
financialRigor.description: We apply technical standards drawn from the financial industry in every process, ensuring deep analysis, solid structures, and informed decision-making.

executionFocus.title: Execution focus
executionFocus.description: We do not stop at diagnosis. We design solutions that can be implemented in real contexts, supporting our clients in decision-making and execution.

contextUnderstanding.title: Contextual understanding
contextUnderstanding.description: We understand the dynamics of the social, business, and development sectors, adapting financial tools to operational, regulatory, and market realities.

sustainability.title: Sustainability as a principle
sustainability.description: We promote financial models that ensure organizations can endure over time, avoiding dependency and strengthening autonomy.

strategyCapitalAlignment.title: Alignment between strategy and capital
strategyCapitalAlignment.description: We connect our clients' strategic objectives with coherent financial structures, facilitating access to and efficient use of resources.

longTermRelationships.title: Long-term relationships
longTermRelationships.description: We build relationships based on trust, confidentiality, and ongoing support, acting as strategic partners rather than external consultants.

services.title: What specific service do we provide?
services.description: GS Capital provides consulting, advisory, and financial structuring services for NGOs, foundations, and impact organizations, covering everything from strategic planning to the implementation of sustainable financial models. Its work includes designing and optimizing fundraising strategies across individual donors, corporate partners, and grants; structuring investment projects with an impact focus; developing revenue collection and income generation models; and building financial frameworks that enable organizations to make informed decisions, manage risk, and scale operations sustainably. In addition, the firm supports development finance and impact investment processes, connecting social needs with viable financial structures under standards of financial rigor similar to those of investment firms, but adapted to the dynamics and constraints of the social sector.
services.secondaryDescription: We integrate solutions designed to improve control, operational efficiency, and growth capacity at every stage of the business.

whyUs.title: Why choose us?
whyUs.description:
GS Capital combines the rigor of a financial firm with a deep understanding of organizations operating in development contexts, including NGOs, foundations, companies, SMEs, and businesses seeking to grow with purpose and sustainability.

Unlike a traditional financial consultancy, GS Capital does not apply standard models designed for large corporations. Instead, it adapts and structures financial solutions according to the reality of each organization: mixed-income models, operational constraints, capital needs, and the specific dynamics of growth in local and international markets.

Its approach integrates three capabilities that are rarely found within the same firm: strategy, finance, and fundraising. This makes it possible to support clients not only in diagnosis, but also in the structuring and implementation of complete financial models that connect growth, sustainability, and access to resources.

GS Capital works with proprietary methodologies that combine strategic planning, financial structuring, fundraising model design, and investment project structuring, adapted to the level of maturity and type of organization, from early-stage processes to expansion and consolidation.

In addition, it has a network of allies and an understanding of the investment and development ecosystem that facilitates connections between organizations, funding sources, investment opportunities, and collaborative structures, both nationally and internationally.

In short, GS Capital acts as a strategic partner that translates growth and development goals into viable, sustainable, and scalable financial structures, with a practical execution-oriented approach.

experience.title: Our Experience and Origins
experience.description:
GS Capital operates as a spin-off of GSA Financieros S.A.S., a Colombian firm founded in 2013 with a well-established track record in banking advisory and specialized services for the financial sector.

GSA Financieros has developed a high technical standard in actuarial calculations, loan settlements, and in-depth financial analysis of products such as leasing and credit in Colombia, working under standards of precision, rigor, and detailed understanding of complex financial structures.

Based on this foundation, GS Capital emerged as a strategic evolution that expands these capabilities into financial consulting, strategic planning, sustainability model structuring, fundraising strategy design, and investment project structuring, applied both to impact organizations and to companies, SMEs, and businesses operating in development contexts.

The experience accumulated since 2013 not only supports its technical expertise, but also enables the transfer of tools and criteria from the traditional financial sector into environments where financial structuring is less standardized, but equally critical.

This translates into the ability to design viable, executable solutions adapted to operational realities, growth processes, and access to capital.

Although its origin is Colombian, GS Capital operates with a Latin American vision and reach, supporting organizations in different countries across the region and structuring solutions that combine local understanding with international-level financial standards.

products.title: Our Products
products.secondaryDescription: We provide solutions designed to improve control, operational efficiency, and growth capacity at every stage of the business.

companies.title: Companies
companies.description: GS Capital operates as part of an ecosystem of organizations and strategic allies that complement its capabilities in financial structuring, consulting, and execution. This ecosystem includes both companies within the same group and organizations with which projects, collaborations, or strategic processes have been developed, enabling comprehensive solutions that connect strategy, capital, and execution. More than an investment portfolio, it is a network of relationships built on trust, experience, and collaborative work across different regional development contexts.

gsaFinancieros.description: A firm specialized in financial advisory, actuarial calculations, loan settlements, and technical analysis of financial products such as leasing and credit in Colombia.

cases.title: Success Cases
cases.description: A sample of engagements where GS Capital has supported impact organizations, territorial initiatives, and growing teams through financial strategy, fundraising, and structured execution.

case1.title: Fundraising optimization and F2F performance
case1.description: International NGO in Colombia facing inefficient face-to-face fundraising operations, high acquisition costs, and weak performance indicators.
case1.advancedDescription:
Challenge
The organization had a relevant donor base, but faced efficiency challenges in its face-to-face (F2F) channel, with high acquisition costs and limited optimization of key performance indicators.

What GS Capital did
Delivered a full diagnosis of the F2F channel across acquisition, retention, and operations.
Analyzed core indicators such as CPA, conversion, and churn.
Designed a performance improvement plan and resource optimization approach.
Structured guidelines to support channel scalability.

Result
Clear opportunities were identified to reduce acquisition costs.
A management model based on indicators was defined.
A roadmap was established to improve channel profitability and scale impact.

case2.title: Regional financial strategy and fundraising structuring
case2.description: International NGO in Latin America needing stronger regional financial structure and fundraising capacity across non-standardized country models.
case2.advancedDescription:
Challenge
The organization needed to strengthen its financial structure and fundraising capacity at a regional level, with multiple countries operating under non-standardized models.

What GS Capital did
Supported the structuring of its financial strategy.
Designed fundraising guidelines for individual donors, corporate partners, and grants.
Provided financial planning and revenue projection support.
Connected regional vision with local execution.

Result
Greater clarity was achieved in the regional financial model.
A more strategic fundraising approach was structured.
A stronger base for organization-wide financial decision-making was created.

case3.title: Impact project structuring and financial model
case3.description: Territorial development initiative requiring clear financial structuring to make implementation viable and connect impact with funding sources.
case3.advancedDescription:
Challenge
The project required a clear financial structure to enable implementation and connect its impact proposition with funding sources.

What GS Capital did
Built the project's financial model.
Defined capital needs and revenue structure.
Aligned expected impact with financial viability.
Supported the narrative for potential funders.

Result
The project was financially structured and ready for capital raising.
Risks, costs, and sustainability became clearer.
A solid base was built for presentation to allies and investors.

case4.title: Financial diagnosis and strategic structuring
case4.description: Growing company or organization dealing with expansion without a clear financial structure to support decisions and long-term sustainability.
case4.advancedDescription:
Challenge
The organization was growing without a clear financial structure, making decision-making and long-term sustainability more difficult.

What GS Capital did
Conducted a comprehensive financial diagnosis.
Built a financial model.
Defined growth scenarios.
Delivered strategic recommendations for financial organization.

Result
A clear view of the financial situation was achieved.
Tools were established for informed decision-making.
A roadmap for structured growth was created.

team.title: Our team
team.description: A team that combines strategy, financial rigor, and close support to structure decisions, capital, and growth with an impact-oriented approach.
